frase_original: I praise the Frenchman his remark was shrewd - "How sweet how passing sweet is solitude." But grant me still a friend in my retreat Whom I may whisper - Solitude is sweet.

texto: What is there in the vale of life Half so delightful as a wife When Friendship love and peace combine To stamp the marriage bond divine?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de William Cowper que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “What is there in the vale of life Half so delightful as a wife When Friendship love and peace com…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amizade, companionship, reflexao, com foco em casamento e termino.

texto: Now stir the fire, and close the shutters fast,Let fall the curtains, wheel the sofa round,And, while the bubbling and loud hissing urnThrows up a steamy column and the cupsThat cheer but not inebriate, wait on each,So let us welcome peaceful ev'ning in.
